fragment:
<set-variable name="targetBackendPool" value="@{
        string requestedModel = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", "");
        
        // Skip backend pool routing for non-LLM requests (e.g., GET operations like listing models)
        if (requestedModel == "non-llm-request")
        {
            return "non-llm-request";
        }
        
        // API-type override: when an api-type defines an explicit backend (e.g., responses → responses-backend),
        // use it directly without pool-based model matching
        string apiTypeOverride = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("apiTypeOverrideBackend", "");
        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(apiTypeOverride))
        {
            return apiTypeOverride;
        }
        
        string defaultBackendPool = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("defaultBackendPool", "");
        string allowedBackendPools = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("allowedBackendPools", "");
        // Optional pool-type filter (set by request-processor for native-prefix api-types so /bedrock/
        // requests cannot accidentally route to an aws-bedrock-mantle pool that happens to advertise the
        // same model name).
        string compatiblePoolTypesCsv = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("compatiblePoolTypes", "");
        var compatiblePoolTypes = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(compatiblePoolTypesCsv)
            ? null
            : compatiblePoolTypesCsv.Split(',').Select(s => s.Trim()).Where(s => s.Length > 0).ToArray();
        JArray backendPools = (JArray)context.Variables["backendPools"];

        var allowedPools = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(allowedBackendPools)
            ? null
            : allowedBackendPools.Split(',').Select(s => s.Trim()).Where(s => s.Length > 0).ToArray();

        // Find all backend pools that support the requested model
        List matchingPools = new List();
        foreach (JObject pool in backendPools)
        {
            // Apply api-type pool-type filter first (e.g., /bedrock/ → only aws-bedrock pools)
            if (compatiblePoolTypes != null)
            {
                var poolType = pool["poolType"]?.ToString() ?? "";
                if (!compatiblePoolTypes.Contains(poolType, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { continue; }
            }
            JArray supportedModels = (JArray)pool["supportedModels"];
            if (supportedModels.Any(model => model.ToString().Equals(requestedModel, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)))
            {
                matchingPools.Add(pool);
            }
        }

        // If we have matching pools, filter by allowed pools if necessary
        if (matchingPools.Count > 0)
        {
            // If there are no restrictions, use the first matching pool
            if (allowedPools == null || allowedPools.Length == 0)
            {
                return matchingPools[0]["poolName"].ToString();
            }
            
            // Otherwise, find the first matching pool that is also in allowed pools
            foreach (var pool in matchingPools)
            {
                string poolName = pool["poolName"].ToString();
                if (allowedPools.Contains(poolName))
                {
                    return poolName;
                }
            }
            
            // If no allowed pools match, check if default backend pool should be used
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(defaultBackendPool))
            {
                return defaultBackendPool;
            }
            
            // If no default is specified, return error that no allowed pools match
            return "ERROR_NO_ALLOWED_POOLS";
        }

        // If no matching pools at all, check for default backend pool
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(defaultBackendPool))
        {
            return defaultBackendPool;
        }
        
        // No matching pools and no default. Distinguish the two failure modes so the
        // caller gets a useful error:
        //   - empty requestedModel  → request never supplied a model parameter
        //   - non-empty             → model was supplied but no pool in the gateway
        //                             advertises it (different from RBAC-denied)
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(requestedModel))
        {
            return "ERROR_NO_MODEL";
        }
        return "ERROR_MODEL_NOT_SUPPORTED";
    }" />

    
    
        
            
        
        
            
                
                    
                        
                        
                            application/json
                        
                        @{
                            return new JObject(
                                new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                    new JProperty("message", "Model parameter is required in the request payload"),
                                    new JProperty("type", "invalid_request_error"),
                                    new JProperty("code", "missing_model_parameter")
                                ))
                            ).ToString();
                        }
                    
                
                
                    
                        
                        
                            application/json
                        
                        @{
                            string requestedModel = (string)context.Variables["requestedModel"];
                            JArray backendPools = (JArray)context.Variables["backendPools"];
                            string compatiblePoolTypesCsv = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("compatiblePoolTypes", "");
                            var compatiblePoolTypes = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(compatiblePoolTypesCsv)
                                ? null
                                : compatiblePoolTypesCsv.Split(',').Select(s => s.Trim()).Where(s => s.Length > 0).ToArray();

                            // Models advertised on the *current* API surface (filtered by compatiblePoolTypes
                            // when the inbound API restricts which pool types it can route to). Only these are
                            // genuinely callable from this surface — listing every gateway model would falsely
                            // imply support for native-only models on the OpenAI-compat surface and vice versa.
                            JArray supportedModels = new JArray();
                            foreach (JObject pool in backendPools)
                            {
                                if (compatiblePoolTypes != null)
                                {
                                    var poolType = pool["poolType"]?.ToString() ?? "";
                                    if (!compatiblePoolTypes.Contains(poolType, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { continue; }
                                }
                                foreach (var model in (JArray)pool["supportedModels"])
                                {
                                    if (!supportedModels.Contains(model))
                                    {
                                        supportedModels.Add(model);
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            // If the model exists in a pool that is incompatible with this API surface,
                            // tell the caller — otherwise they see their model in the gateway's full catalog
                            // (e.g. via GET /models/models) and assume the rejection is a bug.
                            JArray incompatiblePools = new JArray();
                            if (compatiblePoolTypes != null)
                            {
                                foreach (JObject pool in backendPools)
                                {
                                    var poolType = pool["poolType"]?.ToString() ?? "";
                                    if (compatiblePoolTypes.Contains(poolType, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { continue; }
                                    var hosts = (JArray)pool["supportedModels"];
                                    if (hosts.Any(m => m.ToString().Equals(requestedModel, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)))
                                    {
                                        incompatiblePools.Add(poolType);
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            string message = incompatiblePools.Count > 0
                                ? $"Model '{requestedModel}' is not available on this API surface (compatible pool types: {compatiblePoolTypesCsv}). It is hosted by pool type(s) [{string.Join(", ", incompatiblePools.Select(p => p.ToString()))}] which require a different API surface (for example a native /bedrock, /gemini, or /claude path on the Unified AI API). Models available on this surface: {string.Join(", ", supportedModels.Select(m => m.ToString()))}"
                                : $"Model '{requestedModel}' is not supported. Supported models: {string.Join(", ", supportedModels.Select(m => m.ToString()))}";

                            var errorBody = new JObject(
                                new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                    new JProperty("message", message),
                                    new JProperty("type", "invalid_request_error"),
                                    new JProperty("code", incompatiblePools.Count > 0 ? "model_not_available_on_this_surface" : "unsupported_model"),
                                    new JProperty("param", "model"),
                                    new JProperty("supported_models", supportedModels),
                                    new JProperty("incompatible_pool_types", incompatiblePools)
                                ))
                            );
                            return errorBody.ToString();
                        }
                    
                
                
                    
                        
                        
                            application/json
                        
                        @{
                            string requestedModel = (string)context.Variables["requestedModel"];
                            string allowedBackendPools = (string)context.Variables["allowedBackendPools"];
                            
                            return new JObject(
                                new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                    new JProperty("message", $"Access to model '{requestedModel}' is not allowed for this client. You do not have access to any of the backend pools that support this model."),
                                    new JProperty("type", "access_error"),
                                    new JProperty("code", "backend_pool_access_forbidden"),
                                    new JProperty("allowed_backend_pools", allowedBackendPools)
                                ))
                            ).ToString();
                        }
                    
                
            
        
    

    
    <set-variable name="targetPoolType" value="@{
        string targetBackendPool = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("targetBackendPool", "");
        
        // Skip for non-LLM requests
        if (targetBackendPool == "non-llm-request")
        {
            return "non-llm-request";
        }
        
        // If routed via API-type override, mark as such so set-backend-authorization
        // can decide how to handle auth (managed identity is the default)
        string apiTypeOverride = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("apiTypeOverrideBackend", "");
        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(apiTypeOverride) && targetBackendPool == apiTypeOverride)
        {
            // Look up poolType from backendPools if possible, otherwise default to api-type-override
            JArray backendPools = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("backendPools");
            if (backendPools != null)
            {
                foreach (JObject pool in backendPools)
                {
                    if (pool["poolName"].ToString() == targetBackendPool)
                    {
                        return pool["poolType"].ToString();
                    }
                }
            }
            return "api-type-override";
        }
        
        JArray pools = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("backendPools");
        if (pools != null)
        {
            foreach (JObject pool in pools)
            {
                if (pool["poolName"].ToString() == targetBackendPool)
                {
                    return pool["poolType"].ToString();
                }
            }
        }

        return string.Empty;
    }" />

    
    
    <set-variable name="targetAuthType" value="@{
        string targetBackendPool = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("targetBackendPool", "");
        if (targetBackendPool == "non-llm-request") { return "non-llm-request"; }

        JArray pools = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("backendPools");
        if (pools != null)
        {
            foreach (JObject pool in pools)
            {
                if (pool["poolName"].ToString() == targetBackendPool)
                {
                    // Use explicit authType if present, otherwise derive from poolType
                    var authType = pool["authType"]?.ToString();
                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authType)) { return authType; }

                    var poolType = pool["poolType"]?.ToString() ?? "";
                    if (poolType == "ai-foundry" || poolType == "azure-openai") { return "native-backend-authorization"; }
                    if (poolType == "aws-bedrock") { return "aws-sigv4"; }
                    if (poolType == "aws-bedrock-mantle" || poolType == "gemini-openai") { return "api-key-bearer"; }
                    if (poolType == "gemini") { return "api-key-gemini"; }
                    if (poolType == "anthropic") { return "api-key-anthropic"; }
                    if (poolType == "external") { return "none"; }
                    return "native-backend-authorization";
                }
            }
        }
        return "native-backend-authorization";
    }" />

    
    <set-variable name="targetAuthConfigNamedValue" value="@{
        string targetBackendPool = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("targetBackendPool", "");
        if (targetBackendPool == "non-llm-request") { return ""; }

        JArray pools = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("backendPools");
        if (pools != null)
        {
            foreach (JObject pool in pools)
            {
                if (pool["poolName"].ToString() == targetBackendPool)
                {
                    return pool["authConfigNamedValue"]?.ToString() ?? "";
                }
            }
        }
        return "";
    }" />
